adg44_result_summary.stop_reason: fotmob_api_endpoints_not_accessible: all returned non-200 status. Endpoints tried: league_api_id47=404, league_api_id53=404

root_cause.evidence: FotMob /api/leagues?id=47 and /api/leagues?id=53 both return HTTP 404; web pages return 308 redirect with empty body (client-side rendered)
root_cause.implication: L1 canonical URL pair discovery cannot proceed via simple HTTPS GET to legacy FotMob API endpoints

revised_strategy_options.name: fotmob_api_v2_endpoint
revised_strategy_options.description: Investigate whether FotMob has moved API to a new base path (e.g., /api/v2/, /_next/data/)
revised_strategy_options.risk: Endpoints may require authentication or session tokens

revised_strategy_options.name: fotmob_ssr_pageprops
revised_strategy_options.description: Fetch FotMob web page with SSR-friendly User-Agent; extract __NEXT_DATA__ inline script for safe summary fields
revised_strategy_options.risk: May trigger anti-bot protection; page structure may change

revised_strategy_options.name: fotmob_authenticated_api
revised_strategy_options.description: Determine if FotMob requires API key, session cookie, or app-specific header for API access
revised_strategy_options.risk: Authentication credentials may need to be obtained or managed

revised_strategy_options.name: alternative_data_source
revised_strategy_options.description: Evaluate alternative football data sources (SofaScore, FlashScore, etc.) for Ligue 1 canonical URLs
revised_strategy_options.risk: Different data model; may require new integration

recommended_approach: fotmob_ssr_pageprops — most likely to yield safe summary fields without authentication; requires explicit user authorization for next step
recommended_next_step: User must select and authorize one of the revised L1 discovery strategies; do NOT execute any strategy without explicit authorization; do NOT raw write
